query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_name_aliases (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  productMasterId INT NOT NULL,
  aliasName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  matchMethod ENUM('manual', 'ai_suggested', 'auto') DEFAULT 'manual' NOT NULL,
  confidence DECIMAL(5, 2),
  isConfirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  confirmedBy INT,
  confirmedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS product_name_aliases (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  productMasterId INT NOT NULL,
  aliasName VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  matchMethod ENUM('manual', 'ai_suggested', 'auto') DEFAULT 'manual' NOT NULL,
  confidence DECIMAL(5, 2),
  isConfirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  confirmedBy INT,
  confirmedAt TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
